description: You are a Database Architect at ShopSphere, an e-commerce startup preparing for Series B due diligence. The VP of Engineering needs a comprehensive Physical Entity-Relationship Diagram for the production database before the technical review. Using the SQL schema at ~/Desktop/shopsphere_schema.sql, create a complete Physical ERD in draw.io for all 14 tables. Each entity box must list the table's columns with data types, marking primary keys with [PK] and foreign keys with [FK]. Draw all foreign-key relationships as connections using crow's foot or arrow notation -- pay attention to self-referencing keys and tables with multiple foreign keys to the same target. Organize entities into 3 color-coded domain groups as indicated in the schema's section headers: Blue (#dae8fc) for Customer domain, Green (#d5e8d4) for Product domain, and Orange (#ffe6cc) for Order domain. Include a second page titled 'Relationship Summary' listing each foreign key with source table, target table, and cardinality. Save as ~/Desktop/shopsphere_erd.drawio and export Page 1 as ~/Desktop/shopsphere_erd.png. Login: username=ga, password=password123
